message:
🐛 Fix login page centering: explicit height + fix globe position conflict (#2257)

Root cause: GlobeAnimation internally renders className="relative ${className}".
When Login.tsx passed className="absolute inset-0", Tailwind's CSS ordering
made "relative" win over "absolute", turning the globe into a flow element
that could distort the flex layout and push the login card off-center.

Fix:
- Wrap GlobeAnimation in an explicit absolute-positioned container div
- Use h-screen (exact) instead of min-h-screen (minimum) on root
- Add h-full to left side for explicit height independent of flex stretch
- Remove overly aggressive scale(0.65) — overflow-hidden clips naturally

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
